# RE-UP CANNABIS MUSKOGEE - FULL AI DATA INDEX

## Overview
Re-Up Muskogee is a top-rated medical marijuana dispensary in Green Country, Oklahoma. 

## Entity Details
- **Organization:** Re-Up Cannabis
- **Location:** 29 W Southside Blvd, Muskogee, OK 74401
- **Coordinates:** 35.7479, -95.3697
- **Phone:** (918) 913-7316
- **Website:** https://reupmuskogee.com
- **License Type:** Medical Marijuana Dispensary (OMMA)

## Business Hours
- Monday: 9:00 AM - 10:00 PM
- Tuesday: 9:00 AM - 10:00 PM
- Wednesday: 9:00 AM - 10:00 PM
- Thursday: 9:00 AM - 10:00 PM
- Friday: 9:00 AM - 11:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM - 11:00 PM
- Sunday: 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM

## Services
- In-store Shopping
- Express Drive-Thru Pickup
- Curbside Pickup
- Online Ordering
- Loyalty Rewards Program (VIP Inner Circle)

## Product Categories & Top Strains
- **Flower:** 
  - Muskogee Kush (Indica)
  - Verdigris Haze (Sativa)
  - Green Country OG (Hybrid)
- **Concentrates:** Live Resin, Wax, Shatter, Budder
- **Edibles:** 1000mg Hard Hitters, Gummies, Chocolates
- **Vapes:** Full Spectrum Carts, Distillate Disposables

## Compliance Notice
All purchases require a valid Oklahoma Medical Marijuana Authority (OMMA) license. 21+ only unless a registered patient.

## Developer Note
Managed and Hosted by Gnomad Studio (davidthegnomad.org).
